items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step lacks sufficient evidence to confirm or deny the requirement of different pricing per location.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include specific API functionality or outcomes that demonstrate the ability to set different pricing per location as required by the scenario. While the linked use case discusses pricing tiers, it does not provide concrete evidence of how the system handles pricing variations across multiple locations. Therefore, the validation remains inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.
